products.name: MRM1-5
products.descriptor: EU-manufactured multi-role 5-inch tactical trainer and strike drone

evidence.snippet:
### ENGINEERED TO EXCEL
MRM1-5
======
The MRM1-5 is Orqa’s multi-role tactical trainer. This EU-manufactured, dual-use platform features an adaptable design, making it an effective all-in-one solution for training and kinetic operations, while remaining equally capable for commercial and industrial applications.
[Contact Us](/contact?product=mrm1-5)

products.name: FPV.Ctrl
products.descriptor: FPV radio controller for simulator and real-drone operation

evidence.snippet:
FPV.Ctrl
========
FLAWLESS CONTROL
----------------
The essential link between pilot and craft. FPV.Ctrl delivers the low-latency response needed to master both simulators and the sky. Engineered for enduring comfort and built to withstand the field, its sturdy frame gives you the confidence to fly mission after mission.

products.name: SkyDive
products.descriptor: FPV drone racing and freestyle flight simulator for PC and mobile

evidence.snippet:
fpv.skydive
===========
REALISTIC flight simulator
--------------------------
FPV SkyDive is your gateway into the thrilling world of FPV drone racing and freestyle! Feel the adrenaline of high-speed first-person drone flight in realistic single-player and multiplayer scenarios. Master your skills, push the limits, and take to the skies!

products.name: Drone Soccer

evidence.snippet:
Stem meets Sport
================
DRONESOCCER
-----------
Drone Soccer is a team-based indoor sport where students fly, build, and repair drones made for action and collisions, while also gaining hands-on skills that stick!
[get in touch](/contact?product=drone-soccer)

CLEAR COMPLIANCE
----------------
Orqa manufactures all equipment in the EU and sources critical components from trusted, vetted suppliers, ensuring full NDAA compliance and alignment with the highest safety, privacy, and operational standards.

unresolved_questions: Tac.Ctrl ground controller and IRONghost ground station units are referenced in MRM1-5 and MRM2-10 product pages as part of the tactical ecosystem but have no dedicated product pages in the corpus — may be separate orderable products not yet listed on the website.
